description_long: This bus station features a rectangular main building with a flat, overhanging roof and a large awning supported by four robust columns, providing shelter for waiting passengers. The facade includes a set of double glass doors and several large blue-tinted windows, allowing natural light into the interior. The awning extends from the main building and covers a wide platform area, ideal for boarding and alighting from buses. The roof of the awning is labeled with bold 'BUS STATION' signage, making it easily identifiable from a distance. The structure sits on a dark, rectangular base that likely represents the paved area or platform. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern bus station with a flat-roofed main building, large blue windows, and a wide awning supported by four columns, featuring prominent 'BUS STATION' signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double glass doors, large blue windows, and the 'BUS STATION' sign on the awning supported by four columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the awning, the supporting columns, and the side profile of the main building with minimal window detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main building and the awning, with the columns visible and no entrance or signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the upper row of blue windows and the side wall of the main building, with the awning extending away.
attribute_shelter_structure: The shelter is partially covered, consisting of a flat roof supported by four rectangular columns. The main building is enclosed with glass windows and doors, while the awning provides open-sided shelter for waiting passengers. The structure is primarily concrete with metal framing and minimal decorative elements.
attribute_route_signage: One large, flat sign labeled 'BUS STATION' is mounted on top of the awning, visible from the front. The sign is integrated into the roof structure and appears to be made of metal or plastic with bold lettering.
attribute_seating_arrangement: A single long bench is positioned under the awning, parallel to the bus boarding area. The bench is simple, likely made of metal or concrete, and does not appear to have armrests or backrests. It is oriented to face the bus stop area.
attribute_bus_stop_pole: No bus stop pole is present in the asset.
attribute_transparent_panels: Multiple blue-tinted transparent panels are present as windows on the main building, likely made of glass. These panels are framed and cover both the ground and upper floors, providing visibility and natural light.
